item.title: Nearly 10 months of HRT later and this was the first day I went to work wearing feminine clothes
item.description: I started HRT August 8th 2025 (male to female trans) and now less than a year later Ive got my name, license, work ID, and basically everything changed to no longer show my dead name... just waiting on my license to be mailed to me now. It's been a stressful year but one full of rewards thanks to how amazing my friends me coworkers have been. Just really wanted to post this somewhere to celebrate this milestone for me now I just need the customers I help to actually get my gender right and to start voice training! TLDR: just wanna post this to celebrate some big changes in my life to share my joy with anyone who sees it Update: forgot to say this initially but work went well that day (Friday) my coworkers were awesome as usual and no customer was rude FP Edit: thank to everyone for the support it really helps with my self confidence and means a lot.
item.dc:creator: WonderboltBipen

item.title: "The books survived and a mug. Here is a window--you can see the stars at night now" a Kyiv resident shares a look inside her home after a Russian attack destroyed it. "The alcohol also survived, wasn't ours, but I'm definitely drinking it tonight, 100%"
item.description: Their home in Kyiv Ukraine is completely uninhabitable. She somehow still has the strength to joke.

item.title: RIP Marcia Lucas
item.description: Marcia Lucas has sadly passed away at the age of 80 the Oscar winning editor of the original STAR WARS. Marcia wasn’t just part of the film’s editing team, she helped shape some of the most important emotional moments in STAR WARS and won the Academy Award for Best Film Editing alongside Paul Hirsch and Richard Chew for the 1977 classic. Many filmmakers and historians have credited her work as a major reason the film became the phenomenon it did. Beyond STAR WARS, she also worked on AMERICAN GRAFFITI, TAXI DRIVER and RETURN OF THE JEDI, leaving behind a legacy that helped define an entire era of cinema. May the Force be with her. Always. EDIT - Hey, can we not make this into a George bashing post and stick to praising her without shit talking him? It feels disrespectful.
item.dc:creator: LadyCritCat

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1702 (my agonies)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Yeah, this is more accurate than I'd like to admit
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin? Beep. [Kiss noise]" _____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Let Them Eat Sandwich
item.description: Fp edit: Help me achieve my daily sandwich. https://linktr.ee/GridSquares >Can't fathom a $28 sandwich. From a local butcher shop, I can get a bag of frozen chicken breast for $20. All they had to do was pay us a living wage and not plunder the earth. I don't really know what it costs to eat out anymore, because I don't, and I never use the ordering services because that is always far too expensive. Typically, we'll go get it myself, and if I can't, I won't get it. At this point, though, it's cheaper to make things at home. Working to learn how to make bread at home.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: Yet another reason for which I cherish him
item.dc:creator: KleptoKea

item.title: Defining DEI- Disabled veteran takes down conservative ignorance.
item.description: Fp Edit: Hey folks, if you want to help me out, go watch this on YouTube from front to back and check out some of my other content. It means the world and will help me moving forward. Trying to be able to be a little bit self-sufficient here and every Bit of engagement helps.(A side note, yes, the words on the screen do not fully match. That is to get around censorship on other platforms a lot of creators do this.) Made this video so I can just share it to whoever tries to argue about DEI I'm absolutely tired of the continued outpouring of racism and bigotry from the political right. I am a disabled veteran. I am DEI DEI somewhat levels the playing field for those disadvantaged more than myself. This is not a hard concept to absorb. Source: https://youtube.com/shorts/Ibgea85NSjM
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: No One Wanted to Come!
item.description: https://www.forbes.com/sites/antoniopequenoiv/2026/05/30/trump-replacing-great-american-state-fair-with-rally-after-performers-drop-out/ As seen all over the news and imgur, artists and attendies kept canceling on Trump's big birthday and national anniversary event. So now he's turned it into another Rally. This "celebration" was supposed to last from June 25th through July 10th I hope the seats stay empty, like his parade last year!
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.title: Creationism is epistemic abuse, not science
item.description: Carl Sagan addresses why creationism is not taught alongside empirical sciences. Creationism is a subset of science denialism eschewing demonstrable facts for mythological doctrine. Prescribing that science is incompatible with religion creates a fallacious false dilemma that creates an illusion of choosing to endorse ones religion or science. To AI concerns: I'm a human ideator and not a bit or reposter AI agent. I am currently looking into and checking the validity of this clip. It seems to trace back to a National Press Club Q&A session in 1986, link for longer clips below. If anyone finds more evidence confirming it's authenticity, comment it and I'll update or remove accordingly. https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=LCtCY-ALIqY
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Twilight zone
item.description: I know a lot of people will say “they were always like that and just hiding it” but I refuse to believe that, and perhaps that’s just me being naive or not wanting to accept the reality that the people I loved who raised me were always bad people. I am living proof my family were not always like this. I am a kind caring compassionate person, I’m not a racist, I’m very open minded and I’ve always treated people the way I’d like to be treated and never based on their appearance or the color of their skin or their gender identity or sexuality. I was raised to be this way. I grew up in an all white conservative family, and while there were some questionable opinions and stances, the people who raised me weren’t all bad. If they were, they would have raised me to be just as intolerant and racist and hateful as they were and instead of posting this here, I’d be typing a totally different post on truth social right now. Decades of propaganda, fear mongering, divisive rhetoric, and outright lies took all of their insecurities, all of their ignorance, all of their absolute worst selves and brought it all to the surface and amplified it exponentially. Of course plenty were always as awful as they are today, but many were not, many were decent people, nowhere near perfect of course, but decent people that I KNOW would have been shocked if you went back in time and showed them what’s happening today to them back in the 80s or 90s. Yes there was tons of racism and bigotry back then as well, but I also think the average maga voter would not have approved of what’s happening today decades ago. This was done to our families, this was something they did, and this does not absolve our loved ones of responsibility, I’m not defending them or saying they should just be forgiven, they will have to accept responsibility and atone for this if they want to be forgiven, if that’s even on the table at all. But I will never EVER forgive what was done to my family. They were decent people who I cared for and loved deeply and they were ripped away from me over the last 30 years or so.
item.dc:creator: capnadorable

item.title: Every vote....
item.description: And to be honest I doubt his demise will change a thing about what they do or care about. I miss when both parties actually had points I would consider.
item.dc:creator: cyborian

item.title: Ukraine is attacking targets over 2,000 km deep inside Russia.
item.description: Today, a missile alert was sounded in Yamal (Probably a FP-5 "Flamingo") – for the first time since the start of the war. This Arctic region lies more than 2,000 km from the Ukrainian border. Storyteller Putin is currently telling his brainwashed followers that everything is going according to plan and that Ukraine and half of Europe will soon surrender.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant
